description.value: This mercenary has been hired to patrol the roads.
This assassin is doing the dirty work of rich nobles.
A fat and bloated rat scurries about.
A cloaked figure stands here, counting money.
A Balifor city guard stands here, scanning for trouble.
The {MMarvelous{r Cleric{x of{Y Branchala{x
(no long description)
Guarding these gates is a loyal Knight of the Crown.
A robed figure stands behind the counter examining various potions.
A small goblin slinks around here, looking for someone to raid.
{WAn enourmously large man made of marshmellows is here, buisily crushing things.{x
A cleric stands here waiting to help the injured.
Gilas the shopkeeper waits by the counter for your order.
A skeletal figure walks toward you, covered in charred Solamnic armor
(no long description)
A shady figure stands here, waiting to sell you something.......good...
(no long description)
A barbarian shaman sits upon the ground meditating.
(no long description)
A poor farmer goes about his mundane existence in life
A guild cleric stands here, his face shrouded by a cowl.
Faizel the wise stoops over his books, waiting to train the young and impatient.
A mystical unicorn stands here in all its majesty
A slinky ferret runs over to you
Jexharan the store owner walks around the room with a dustpan and brush in his hands.
The savage royal baboon bares it's sharp teeth as you approach
Mayor Astenaarde turns to face you, and begins to chant in the tongue of magic
A town guard awaiting troublemakers, stares at you

title.value: a Town guard patrolling the area

description.value: Iagaremis the smith stands over his anvil making new weapons.
Sarah the green grocer goes about polishing the apples for people to buy
Izazul has come to take your soul and banish it to hell
A man dressed in robes is here praying, probably a healer.
An old man sits with his legs crossed.
A pudgy man with a pleasant smile looks at you.
It will kill you
A Guardian of the Solamnic Headquarters stands here at attention.
The Innkeeper stands here, cleaning glasses.
A sullen bard is here, drinking away his problems.
A Knight of the Crown stands here guarding the gate.
A Priest of Habbakuk is here, tending to wounded knights.
A Knight of the Sword is here, healing the wounded.
A Priest of {WPaladine{x is here, giving blessings and comfort to the knights.
A {WKnight{x of the {rRose{x stands here, guarding the door.
Amber stands here, ready to sell you the wares of the world.
A cleric stands here shouting about his god.
A winged creature with a fire aura glides around.
An old mage is here writing on a book.
A giant red looks dangerous watching you carefully.
A heavy armored warhorse stands here looking imponent.
A man standing behind the counter.
A dwarf blacksmith is here taking care of his weapons.
A tall shopkeeper is behind the counter looking nervously at you.
A young attractive woman is here staring at you.
A {Rcol{Yo{Grfull{x parrot is here talking with customers.
Goldmoon is singing a beautiful song here.
Fewmaster Toede is here, looking self-important.
Riverwind the Plainsman is standing here.
A robed figure is standing here.
A farmer is standing here looking after his workers...
A farm worker is here harvesting grain.
There is a barracuda swimming around you...it looks hungry..
There is a very large Turtle dragon here.
The farmer's guard dog is here guarding whatever he's supposed to guard.
A strange-looking fish swims past.
A small hobgoblin seems to be searching for something.
A beautiful white stag is here.
An old worn out bear is here.
A large rat is here eating grain.
A small field mouse runs across your foot.
A small butterfly is here.
A small dragonfly is flying here.
A hobgoblin guard stands here.
A Hobgoblin is here, grinning at you.
A small hobgoblin is here.
A Hobgoblin Elite Guard stands here.
Raol, son of the hobgoblin leader, stands here.
A hobgoblin cook is here, roasting some animal.
A hobgoblin female is watering her plants.
A bard rests in the shade of the tree.
A cockroach lies here.
A crow is resting on the dead tree's branch.
A zombie is here.
A skeleton with a sword is here.
A skeleton archer stands here, bow cocked and arrow notched.
A brown wyvern is here.
An undead cleric stands here.
A shadow
A cloaked man is here.
A hobgoblin infant is here.
A female hobgoblin is here.
An important hobgoblin warrior is here.
Rolgusk, the Hobgoblin leader is here.
A hobgoblin assassin is hiding here.
A hobgoblin shaman is here, casting bones.
A very large hobgoblin is here.
A hobgoblin is here, looking at you.
A large hobgoblin guard stands here.
The Forest Guardian stands here.
A large and beautiful {WWhite{x Stag stands here munching on some grass.
The Grimbough Tree stands here, waiting to devour you.
A Centaur of Keening Wind is here looking for a fight.
The Forestmaster of Darken Wood stands here with a sad look.
A cleric in dark gray robes stands here healing his brethren.
A dark cleric of the Black Order stands guard over the Dark Temple here.

title.value: a dark cleric of the Black Order

description.value: A Knight of Takhisis is here awaiting orders.
A Flotsam City Guard stands here letting trouble happen.
A giant Flotsam city guard stands here blocking your way!
A Flotsam citizen stands here looking out for trouble.
A hired mercenary stands here looking for someone...
({yDrunk{X) A sailor staggers by here.
A Flotsam city guard is keeping watch over the street here.
A fat merchant stands here counting his money.
A Flotsam citizen walks by here.
A clever kender is here borrowing objects from people.
A hidden thief stares at your pockets!
A minotaur thug is waiting for his next victim.
Juli the elf mage stands here selling her brews.
Gringor the blacksmith stands here with his weapons ready for sale.
An old {csailor{X stands here ready to sell you the latest catch.
A {Dminotaur{x cleric stand here ready to heal you for a price!
A merchant stands here looking over his goods.
An old fisherman is here casting out to sea.
A young sailor is here carrying some heavy rope.
A {rred-robed{x mage stands here contemplating her skills.
The Rock Gate guard is willing to let you in for a small "gift".
An old sailor is here waiting to take your order.
A small worm is on the lookout for some nice dirt here.
Rangor the Blacksmith is here making weapons to sell.
Miss Gwen is here looking after her "daughters".
{MMissy{x the harlot is here to serve you!
A sailor is here washing the deck.
The Captain of the Phoenix is standing here watching over his crew.
A cleric of Reorx is here blessing the weapons made.
An old dwarf is here, selling smithy stuff.
A Dwarven bartender is here, waiting for your order.
A stocky Dwarf stands here guarding The Forge from intruders.
The great Drodge Firestone stands on a stool, waiting to sell you something.
(no long description)
A drooling elven zombie moans at you.
A group of skeletal bats hang here upsidedown.
A flesh golem constructed of various bodies is here, dripping with blood.
A golem stands here, made purely of rock and stone.
A phantom floats here things seem to pass right through it.
A frail looking skeleton stands before you, bones held together by some unknown power.
A minotaur casting necromancer spells stands before you.
An enormous Black Dragon towers above you.
Perched upon a tree branch, stands a small humming bird.
A deformed man with a foul smell stands here waiting to sell you a few things.
A well-dressed thief stands here, eyeballing your money pouch.
An enslaved demon rests his sunken, hollow eyes upon you.
A well-cloaked thief stands here, keeping a watchful eye over the Hall.
An ancient guardian dragon of the future stares you down with it's black eyes...
A Priestess of Hiddukel stands here, showing off her beauty.
A kobold squats here, plaing a game of rocks with his friends.
A large bear tries to take a bite out of your hide.
A large leopard stands here feeding off of its last victim.
A white snowflake blows by your face harsly...
An ice demon stands here, keeping himself well concealed in the icy road.
A large, fearsome looking ice dragon stands here, prepared for anything.
A maiden slave stands here, waiting to take your order.
A mirror image of yourself stands here, waiting to aid you in your training.
A female slave stands here, sharing the pain.
The Executioner stands here, waiting for you to make one wrong move.
A male slave stands here in anguish.
A beautiful maiden, has been changed to the walls.
A tax collector stands here wanting your gold, now!
A Priestess of Hiddukel stands here waiting to please you.
A wandering bandit stands here waiting for easy pickings.
An injured man with blood seeping from many cuts rests up against the wagon.
A thief lies in waiting.
A shepherd sits here, taking a break from the long hike.
A black sheep stands here, munching on some grass.
A Dwarven miner stands here, picking at the walls for valuable ore.
A Dwarven guard stands here, ready to protect the foreman if needed.
A Dwarven gladiator awaits his turn to fight in the arena.
A Dwarven cook stands here impatiently waiting for you to make up your mind.
A Dwarven foreman delegates all the authority among the miners down here.
A straw dummy stands here, waiting to take everything you got.
An anti-theft dummy sits in the middle of the room.
The banker is here, hard at work.
